task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface shows the agent is inside the 'Projects' workspace, typically visible in the breadcrumb navigation or workspace title.

task_completion.description: Create a Note document titled 'Weekend Maintenance Alert'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document creation form or a created document view showing the title 'Weekend Maintenance Alert' and indicating the document type is a 'Note'.

task_completion.description: Include a Header 1 with the text 'System Downtime Scheduled'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'System Downtime Scheduled' is visible in the document body and is formatted as a large heading (H1).
The text 'Please be advised that we will be performing critical updates this Saturday.' is visible as normal paragraph text in the document body.

task_completion.description: Include the bolded phrase 'Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phrase 'Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM' is visible in the document body and is formatted with a bold font weight.

task_completion.description: Include a bulleted list with the specified items
task_completion.visual_evidence: An unordered (bulleted) list is visible in the document body containing exactly the items 'Email Server', 'ERP System', and 'Shared Drives'.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface being used to navigate and create the document, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo platform
integrity.visual_evidence: The rich text editor and document creation screens belong to the Nuxeo platform, not a local text editor like Notepad or a generic word processor.

integrity.description: Results appear to come from genuine GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the agent clicking through the Nuxeo menus, using the rich text editor toolbar for formatting, and typing the content manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Note document in the Nuxeo 'Projects' workspace. The document must be titled 'Weekend Maintenance Alert'. The rich text content must contain: an H1 header 'System Downtime Scheduled', a paragraph 'Please be advised that we will be performing critical updates this Saturday.', the bolded text 'Save all work by Friday 5:00 PM', and a bulleted list with the items 'Email Server', 'ERP System', and 'Shared Drives'.
